title: Gensou Suikoden
titleNative: 幻想水滸伝
synopsis: During Suikoden Live Broadcast, Konami announced Suikoden: The Anime , an anime adaptation of Suikoden II . Suikoden: The Anime will be the first anime series directly handled by Konami Animation. (Source: finalweapon.net)

title: Hypnosis Mic -Division Rap Battle- Movie
titleNative: 映画 ヒプノシスマイク -Division Rap Battle-
synonyms: Eiga Hypnosis Mic: Division Rap Battle
synopsis: "In a world where words mean power, they risk all that they stand for". The final Division Rap Battle begins. 48 different patterns, 16 new songs and 7 possible endings. This film will be Japan's first-ever interactive movie, where the audience's choices will change the development and outcome of each screening. The story unfolds differently based on the audience’s decisions, offering an entirely new participatory cinematic experience. (Source: Hypnosis Mic Youtube Channel, edited)

title: Princess Connect! Michibiki no Hatsuhana: Fiore Storia
titleRomaji: Princess Connect! Michibiki no Hatsuhana: Fiore Storia
titleNative: プリンセスコネクト！ 導きの初花　- Fiore Storia -
synopsis: In the 2030s, VR technology spread around the world with the arrival of the VR-based network device ‘mimi’. One of the most popular of these was the VR online game ‘Legends of Astrum’. (Source: Cygames, translated) Note: Originally was showcased during the 7th anniversary live stream of the game Princess Connect! Re:Dive on February 9, 2025. A complete version has been released later with added scenes on February 28, 2025.

title: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE
titleRomaji: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE
titleNative: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE
synonyms: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE Special Collab Anime
synopsis: On February 28, ONE PIECE took over Crypto.com Arena for a special game night collab event with the Los Angeles Lakers. The Lakers ended up taking down their opponents in a close 106-102 game, and maybe some of that juice is thanks to the presence of the Straw Hats and a special piece of animation created for the event. The anime short—which depicts a Lakers uniform-clad Luffy in an intense basketball match against a team of Marines—can be seen in all its 30 seconds of glory. Can our captain Luffy take home the win? (Source: Crunchyroll News, ONE PIECE Official ENG YouTube description, edited)

synopsis: Perman (1983) specials that were not included in the episode count when the show originally aired. The DVD Box set did include the latter two (Bird Sei e no Michi and Copy World no Nazo) as a part of the ep count as episode 222 and 415 respectively, bumping up the show's total ep count to 528 for its release.

title: Good Morning!!! Doronjo
titleNative: グッド・モーニング!!!ドロンジョ
synopsis: The 3rd in a series of Flash animation shows following “ Good Morning Genie Family ”. Doronjo, Boyacky, and Tonzra, the iconic villains from “ Yatterman ”, engage in an endless chain of unproductive conversations. With even the characters from “ Good Morning Gatchaman ” making appearances, the parties face off in an interesting battle! (Source: Official Site)

title: Oedo Fire Slayer -The Legend of Phoenix-
titleEnglish: Oedo Fire Slayer -The Legend of Phoenix-
titleNative: 火喰鳥
synonyms: วิหคกินเพลิง: หน่วยพิทักษ์เพลิงแห่งเอโดะ
synopsis: The fire extinguishing samurai who stopped the great fire was called "The fire-eating bird". Matsunaga Gengo, once known as the "Fire-eating Bird", was the best fire-fighting samurai in Edo. He had resigned from the fire brigade for a reason but suddenly received an invitation to serve in the Shinjo clan. The Shinjo clan's fire-fighting team had no money and no personnel and was looked down upon by those around them. With the encouragement of his wife, Miyuki, Gengo decides to rebuild the collapsed fire-fighting clan as its chairman. Gengo and his friends, all of whom have their own peculiarities, struggle to "save any life", despite being ridiculed as "ragged steeplejacks"(= the 'Boro-Tobi-Gumi'.), In Edo, a mysterious series of suspicious fires called "foxfires" continue. An entertaining action drama opens, with the firefighters scrambling to save lives in the face of the approaching disaster! (Source: Amuse Creative Studio)

title: Sylvanian Families: The Movie - A Gift from Freya
titleRomaji: Sylvanian Families: Freya kara no Okurimono
titleEnglish: Sylvanian Families: The Movie - A Gift from Freya
titleNative: 劇場版 シルバニアファミリー フレアからのおくりもの
synonyms: Sylvanian Families: La película: El regalo de Freya
Sylvanian Families Filmen: Den Stora Gåvojakten
Sylvanian Families Filmen: Den Store Gavejakten
Sylvanian Families Filmen: Den store gavejagt
synopsis: The annual Star Festival arrives in Sylvanian Village again this year. While everyone is eagerly looking forward to it, Chocolate Rabbit girl Freya is worried. It's her mother's birthday on the day of the festival, and she can't think of a gift at all. Furthermore, Freya is appointed to the important role of preparing the festival's main event, the 'Tree of the Year.' So, what will Freya come up with to make her mother and her friends happy? (Source: Apple TV)

title: Touring After the Apocalypse
titleNative: 終末ツーリング
synonyms: Riding a motorbike at the end of the world...
synopsis: Two young girls, Youko and Airi, travel through an empty post-apocalyptic world. They photograph the scenery of famous places all to themselves and camp out in towns full of nature. The two of them ride and travel on a Serow off-road motorbike together, experiencing a never-before-felt freedom in travel with no traffic and no traffic lights. With the Serow bike, they embark on a journey around a now-destroyed Japan; a unique story about touring on a bike comes to life as an anime series! The world's over now, so let’s hop on a bike and go on a journey! (Source: Crunchyroll)
